calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

John Park, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Serenity Medspa LLC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Pop Labs, Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Witness: Lisa Kang, Sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $17,140.00
Attorney's Fees: $2,050.00
Costs: $566.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $19,756.00
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Continued To Apr-24-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2012 Continued To Dec-26-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
